Aries 4. 2. 0. 2, 4. 4, 2, 2. 4, 4, 0, 2.
In the chart of Mars you will get the following figures in the
12 signs after correction :—2, 1, I, 2, 2, I. L 2, 2, 1, I, 2. In
Mercury's chart you will find the following figures 0, 0,
0. 2, 0, 4, 0, 2, 0, 4, 0, 2. In Jupiter's chart you will see the
following 3, 0, 0, 5, 3, 3, 0. 5, 3, 3, 0, 5. In that of Venus
the following figures will be seen : 2, 3, 3, 4, 2, 3, 3, 4, 2, 3,
